debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
⊢ deriv (GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f) = GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h : deriv (interpolated x y f) = interpolated_deriv x y f := by
    have h₁ : deriv (interpolated x y f) = deriv (f ∘ (fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y)) := rfl
    rw [h₁]
    -- Compute the derivative of the composed function using the chain rule
    have h₂ : deriv (f ∘ (fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y)) = ∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y)) := by
      -- This is a placeholder for the actual computation of the derivative using the chain rule
      have h₃ : HasDerivAt (f ∘ (fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y)) (∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y))) 0 := by
        sorry
      have h₄ : deriv (f ∘ (fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y)) = ∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y)) := by
        apply HasDerivAt.deriv
        exact h₃
      exact h₄
    rw [h₂]
    -- Simplify the expression to match the definition of interpolated_deriv
    have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, derivAt (nth_partial i f) ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y) = derivAt (nth_partial i f) x := by
      intro i
      simp [sub_zero, zero_smul]
      <;>
      ext <;>
      simp [smul_eq_mul]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
    have h₄ : ∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) ((1 - (0 : ℝ)) • x + (0 : ℝ) • y)) = ∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) x) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro i _
      rw [h₃ i]
    rw [h₄]
    have h₅ : (∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (derivAt (nth_partial i f) x)) = ∑ i : Fin n, (y ⟨i, by omega⟩ - x ⟨i, by omega⟩) * (nth_partial i f x) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro i _
      have h₆ : derivAt (nth_partial i f) x = nth_partial i f x := by
        -- This is a placeholder for the actual proof that the derivative of the partial derivative is the partial derivative itself
        have h₇ : derivAt (nth_partial i f) x = nth_partial i f x := by
          simp [derivAt_const]
          <;>
          ext <;>
          simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
          <;>
          norm_num
        exact h₇
      rw [h₆]
    rw [h₅]
    <;>
    simp [interpolated_deriv, Pi.add_apply, Pi.sub_apply, Pi.smul_apply]
    <;>
    congr 1
    <;>
    ext i
    <;>
    simp [Fin.ext_iff]
    <;>
